DESCRIPTION: Verifies that a non-existent name filter returns an empty paginated list
NAME: GetAll_WhenFilteredByNonExistentName_ReturnsEmptyList

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that providing a valid name filter returns only the matching group
NAME: GetAll_WhenFilteredByName_ReturnsMatchingGroup

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that a user can link an existing subscription to a group
NAME: ShareSubscription_WhenValid_AddsLinkInDatabase

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that the API prevents group creation if the authenticated Auth0 ID does not exist in our system
NAME: Create_WhenUserDoesNotExist_ReturnsBadRequest

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that a group can be retrieved by its unique identifier
NAME: GetById_WhenValid_ReturnsCorrectGroup

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that a member can leave a group, their record is removed, and a departure event is fired
NAME: LeaveGroup_WhenValid_RemovesMemberAndPublishesEvent

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that a participant can be promoted to a moderator and an event is published
NAME: ChangeRole_WhenParticipant_PromotesToModerator

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that a group is successfully removed from the database when a valid ID is provided
NAME: Delete_WhenValidId_RemovesGroup

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that a new group can be created and the creator is automatically assigned as Admin
NAME: Create_WhenValidData_CreatesGroupAndAddsOwnerAsAdmin

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that the API returns cached data even if the underlying database record changes
NAME: GetById_ShouldUseCache_OnConsecutiveCalls

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that the API returns BadRequest when the group name is empty
NAME: Create_WhenNameIsEmpty_ReturnsUnprocessableEntity

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that an existing group can be updated and changes are persisted in the database
NAME: Update_WhenValidData_ReturnsUpdatedGroup
